negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.lp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.lp
1. loaned_out_to(ailton,braga) [input(axiom)]
2. club(braga) [input(axiom)]
5. ? [X0] : (club(X0) & loaned_out_to(ailton,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (club(X0) & loaned_out_to(ailton,X0)) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ! [X0] : (~club(X0) | ~loaned_out_to(ailton,X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
8. loaned_out_to(ailton,braga) [cnf transformation 1]
9. club(braga) [cnf transformation 2]
12. ~loaned_out_to(ailton,X0) | ~club(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
13. ~club(braga) [resolution 8,12]
14. $false [forward subsumption resolution 13,9]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.lp
% Termination reason: Refutation
